query:
INSERT INTO time_step_preset
          (
            id,
            name,
            default_duration_seconds,
            auto_advance,
            record_save_enabled,
            capture_enabled,
            grayscale_enabled,
            result_required,
            result_save_path,
            created_at,
            updated_at
          )
        VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6, ?7, ?8, NULL, ?9, ?9)
